mnemonics.title: DStream Components
mnemonics.content: RDDs in Discretized Streams: Real-time Data Divided (RDD)

acronyms.usage: Core abstraction representing continuous data stream as sequence of RDDs

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a conveyor belt splitting continuous data into small containers (batches)

analogies.analogy: Like analyzing traffic patterns through a moving car window - only see data within time window
